_README: Phase 0 acceptance fixtures. LEGAL (AfroHit HARD rule): every file MUST be audio Benjamin owns or has licensed — NO YouTube/Spotify rips. Audio + stems live in this folder and are GITIGNORED; only this manifest.json is committed. Need 9 real rows: 3 amapiano + 3 afrobeats + 3 house. Delete this EXAMPLE row.
_HOWTO_STEMS: Pre-separate stems ONCE offline with Demucs (htdemucs, 4-stem) so the harness never hits Replicate: `python3 -m demucs -n htdemucs path/to/song.wav` → produces bass.wav/drums.wav/other.wav/vocals.wav. Put paths (relative to this folder, or absolute) in bassStem/drumsStem/otherStem.
